videos.headline: Vanderbilt Commodores vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights
videos.description: Vanderbilt Commodores vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Vanderbilt Commodores vs. Alabama Crimson Tide: Full Highlights) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Martel Hight picks off Ty Simpson on Bama's opening drive
videos.description: Martel Hight intercepts the pass from Ty Simpson on Alabama's opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Martel Hight picks off Ty Simpson on Bama's opening drive) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alexander takes it 65 yards to the house for Vandy
videos.description: Sedrick Alexander breaks through the Alabama defense and scores a touchdown for Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alexander takes it 65 yards to the house for Vandy) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia fumbles in the red zone
videos.description: Justin Jefferson punches the ball away from Diego Pavia and Alabama recovers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diego Pavia fumbles in the red zone) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson connects with Ryan Williams for TD
videos.description: Ryan Williams hauls in a 14-yard pass from Ty Simpson for the Alabama touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson connects with Ryan Williams for TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Diego Pavia passes to Sedrick Alexander for a Commodores TD
videos.description: Diego Pavia hits Sedrick Alexander with a 4-yard pass for the Vanderbilt TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Diego Pavia passes to Sedrick Alexander for a Commodores TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama staffer carted off field after scary sideline collision
videos.description: A sideline staffer for Alabama had to be carted off the field after a scary collision.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama staffer carted off field after scary sideline collision) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson finds Germie Bernard for the Alabama TD
videos.description: Germie Bernard hauls in Ty Simpson's pass for the 27-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ty Simpson finds Germie Bernard for the Alabama TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Conor Talty kicks 30-yard field goal) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Keon Sabb picks off Diego Pavia
videos.description: Diego Pavia throws an interception to Keon Sabb for Vanderbilt's second red zone turnover of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Keon Sabb picks off Diego Pavia) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama seals win on Jam Miller TD
videos.description: Jam Miller seals the win for Alabama with a 20-yard TD run vs. Vanderbilt.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama seals win on Jam Miller TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ty Simpson highlights Crimson Tide's performance in the trenches
videos.description: Simpson talks about how motivated Alabama was ahead of the matchup with Vanderbilt at home while discussing the Tide's win with a big smile.
